basic_details.job_title: CURAJ Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow & Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) Recruitment 2026: Central University of Rajasthan has released the official notification for 2 Junior Research Fellow & Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years for JRF/PA, with relaxation for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years).
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years for Junior Research Fellow & Project Assistant. Age Relaxation: SC/ST candidates are eligible for a relaxation of up to 5 years, and OBC candidates are eligible for a relaxation of up to 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, or any branch of life science with >= 55% or equivalent CGPA. For JRF, NET/GATE qualification is required.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, and any branch of life science with >= 55% or equivalent CGPA with a good academic record from a recognized university/institute as per UGC norms. For JRF, the candidate should have qualified NET/GATE /other national level examination conducted by a central agency like CSIR and DBT. Candidates with knowledge and experience in biochemistry, plant molecular biology, and plant tissue culture may be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000 + 9% HRA for JRF & Rs 20000 + 9% HRA for PA
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 + 9% HRA Project Assistant: Rs. 20,000 + 9% HRA

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit Offline interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CURAJ Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.central_university_of_rajasthan: Rs. 37,000 + 9% HRA for JRF & Rs 20000 + 9% HRA for PA
M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, or any branch of life science with >= 55% or equivalent CGPA. For JRF, NET/GATE qualification is required.
Max 28 years for JRF/PA, with relaxation for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years).

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CURAJ Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CURAJ Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, and any branch of life science with >= 55% or equivalent CGPA with a good academic record from a recognized university/institute as per UGC norms. For JRF, the candidate should have qualified NET/GATE /other national level examination conducted by a central agency like CSIR and DBT. Candidates with knowledge and experience in biochemistry, plant molecular biology, and plant tissue culture may be preferred.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years for Junior Research Fellow & Project Assistant. Age Relaxation: SC/ST candidates are eligible for a relaxation of up to 5 years, and OBC candidates are eligible for a relaxation of up to 3 years.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 + 9% HRA Project Assistant: Rs. 20,000 + 9% HRA

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on merit Offline interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CURAJ Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CURAJ Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow and Project Assistant positions is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow position, candidates must have an M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, or any branch of life science with at least 55% marks and must have qualified NET/GATE or equivalent national-level examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit and an offline interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000 plus 9% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any specific experience requirements for these posts?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, candidates with experience in biochemistry, plant molecular biology, and plant tissue culture may be preferred.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CURAJ?
faq.answer: Central University of Rajasthan has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Junior Research Fellow and Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Central University of Rajasthan?
faq.answer: The official website of Central University of Rajasthan is http://www.curaj.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CURAJ/BIOCHEM/SKP/DBT/01.
